parameters.query:
-- 24-часовое напоминание (в окне 24h..24h15m)
SELECT b.id              AS booking_id,
       b.starts_at,
       c.tg_chat_id,
       c.full_name,
       s.title           AS service_title,
       '24h'             AS kind
  FROM bookings b
  JOIN clients  c ON c.id = b.client_id
  JOIN services s ON s.id = b.service_id
 WHERE b.status = 'confirmed'
   AND b.reminder_24h_sent = FALSE
   AND b.starts_at BETWEEN NOW() + interval '24 hours'
                       AND NOW() + interval '24 hours 15 minutes'
UNION ALL
-- 1-часовое напоминание (в окне 1h..1h15m)
SELECT b.id, b.starts_at, c.tg_chat_id, c.full_name, s.title, '1h'
  FROM bookings b
  JOIN clients  c ON c.id = b.client_id
  JOIN services s ON s.id = b.service_id
 WHERE b.status = 'confirmed'
   AND b.reminder_1h_sent = FALSE
   AND b.starts_at BETWEEN NOW() + interval '1 hour'
                       AND NOW() + interval '1 hour 15 minutes';

UPDATE bookings
   SET reminder_24h_sent = CASE WHEN $2 = '24h' THEN TRUE ELSE reminder_24h_sent END,
       reminder_1h_sent  = CASE WHEN $2 = '1h'  THEN TRUE ELSE reminder_1h_sent  END
 WHERE id = $1;
